name: Windows Firewall Settings Have Been Changed
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Windows Firewall Settings Have Been Changed
SIGMA Description: Detects activity when the settings of the Windows firewall have been changed

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('2002', '2083', '2003', '2082', '2008') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Windows Firewall Settings Have Been Changed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('2002', '2083', '2003', '2082', '2008') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Windows Firewall Settings Have Been Changed
